name: Upwind
description: Imports cloud-security findings from Upwind (https://www.upwind.io), a runtime-powered CNAPP (cloud-native application protection: vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, runtime threats, identity & posture). Each affected cloud resource / host / image becomes an ASSET and every finding a VULNERABILITY / ASSETVULNERABILITY (ref = CVE when present, else UPWIND-<hash>; severity from the finding's risk level). Offline mode: export findings to JSON and import via `file` (accepts a findings array or a {findings|vulnerabilities|issues|results|data:[...]} object). Live mode: set env UPWIND_API_URL + UPWIND_CLIENT_ID + UPWIND_CLIENT_SECRET (OAuth2 client-credentials, best-effort) to pull findings from the API. No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to an Upwind findings export (JSON) to import.

parameters.name: project
parameters.help: Default asset name for findings whose record carries no resource/host/image.
